== Notes for [[Item:Q112894|Q112894]] ==

Barrau-Dihigo asserts that Román, alleged son of King Froila and supposed ancestor of the Traba family, was an entirely fictitious invention.


----



Married in 830 to REMÓN ou ROMAN né de CANTABRIA, conde de Monterroso & Santa Marta de Ortigueira MONTERROSO (de) ca 750

His Parents : FRUELA I dit EL HOMBRE DE HIERRO né de CANTABRIA (astur-leonesa, asesinado por asesinar a su hermano VIMARANO), 4e rey (elegido) de Asturias 757-768 ASTURIAS (de) ca 715-ca 768 & ERMESSINDE MONTERROSO (de) ca 725) with

Children: Rodrigo Romaés, conde, señor de Monterroso & Ortigueira MONTERROSO (de) ca 790

https://gw.geneanet.org/macfouillade?lang=en&pz=godefroid+iii+dit+le+chauve+sire+de+rumigny+08+aubenton+02+belgique+wallonne+namur+florennes+auvelais+sambreville+echerennes+philippeville+...+par+1e+alliance+martigny&nz=rumigny+florennes+de&p=teresa+arias&n=asturias+de

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
